name: Frozen Citrus Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen concentrate orange juice or lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the frozen concentrate in a large mixing bowl for about 30 seconds.
2. Blend in the softened vanilla ice cream until smooth.
3. Fold in the whipped topping until fully incorporated.
4. Freeze the mixture if necessary, until it will mound when scooped.
5. Spoon into the prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
Note: Store leftover pie in the freezer.
